remainingGaps.details: Discord, Slack, Telegram, and WhatsApp live channel credentials are absent and no Convex credential broker variables are available in this worktree session.
Helper-backed primary claims are recorded as current ownership findings; this baseline does not change their executables or ownership.

commands: OPENCLAW_BUILD_PRIVATE_QA=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario channel-message-flows --channel-driver qa-channel
OPENCLAW_BUILD_PRIVATE_QA=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario channel-message-flows --channel-driver crabline --channel telegram

corepack pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario docker-compose-setup --scenario gateway-smoke --scenario mcp-gateway-connect-startup-retry --scenario webchat-auto-tts --concurrency 1 --fast
node scripts/run-node.mjs qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario hosted-image-generation-providers-live --allow-failures --concurrency 1 --fast
